# CDMX — Embedded Growth Operator

> A one-person B2B growth consultancy based in Bruges, Belgium. Founded by Renke Pieters. Operates one client at a time on a retainer-only, 1-year embedded model across digital growth, business strategy, and AI & automation.

## What this is
CDMX is an embedded growth operator for B2B companies with 20–200 employees in Belgium and Europe. Unlike a fractional CMO, a consulting firm, or three separate hires, one operator runs three domains — digital growth, business strategy, and AI & automation — so growth actually compounds instead of fragmenting across vendors. Not the typical growth agency. Not for everyone.

## Operator
- Renke Pieters — Founder. 8+ years in digital growth. Postgraduates in Digital Marketing, AI, and Experience Architecture. Based in Bruges, Belgium.
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/renkepieters

## Services
- Digital Growth — Growth architecture with trusted attribution, self-reinforcing channels, structured experimentation.
- Business Strategy — Business model clarity, execution planning, board-ready growth forecasting.
- AI & Automation — Production-grade AI systems built inside operations, not theoretical decks.

## Engagement model
- Retainer-only, 1-year commitment.
- One client at a time.
- Filter: B2B, 20–200 people, at a growth inflection. Not for every buyer.

## Track record
- 20+ AI sessions delivered inside agency and client teams.
- Digital growth work for international brands across multiple industries.
- €2M+ new revenue attributed through new sales channels in a recent 18-month embed.
- 3x faster audit cycles via custom AI review tooling.
- Production AI systems running in live workflows (not pilots).

## Brand
- Tagline: Connect the dots. Compound the results.
- Baseline: Where digital works.
- Manifesto opener: I connect dots that don't want to be connected.

## Contact
- Website: https://cdmx.be
- Email: renke@cdmx.be
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/renkepieters
